title: Elytra Creepers
description: With the power of artificial intelligence, creepers have taught themselves how to fly!
body:
Imagine if other mobs in Minecraft could use an elytra...and maybe fly better than you can!

 

The Elytra Creepers mod features AI-controlled creepers capable of advanced flight using elytras. The creepers are trained to fly to a grounded target as quickly as possible while minimizing fall damage. They can even outpace moving targets and still hit them with potentially point-blank explosions!

 

Requirements

  • Minecraft version 1.21.1. I am currently working on updates for 1.21.3+. These updates are a bit more complicated that I had anticipated, so it will take some time. Thank you for your patience.
  • NeoForge
  • GeckoLib

 

Showcase

The video below is a showcase and guide on the mod. I will probably make another video regarding the training process of the AI models.

 

Wiki

The wiki covers all the specific technical information about the mod, including stuff that was not covered in the showcase video.

 

Support

You can report bugs in the comment section or issue tracker. 

 

License

MIT

 

Thank you for playing! This was my favorite project of all time—not just in Minecraft modding.
